input_text: A flower was white. The aunts saw shoes. Mr Dursley is an American. Penguins live in water. "Riga is outside America. The horse kept in the stable was calm. Paul ate a sandwich and Bill a salad. Eve reported that Tom arrived. Elephants have long trunks and short tails. John is grandfather of Mike. Mary journeyed to the bathroom. The stone was heavy. The hand of a man moved a wheel. Catholics can not disappear. The road leading to the village was narrow. Tallinn is in Estonia. The bike's length is 10 kilometers. Did Tom depart?
